'''gakoyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:scalaron|scalaron]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-k-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:scalaron|scalaron]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gakoyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gækeyeth|gækeyeth]] || [[word:gækeyej|gækeyej]] || [[word:gækeyesh|gækeyesh]] || [[word:gækeye|gækeye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gakokoyoth|gakokoyoth]] || [[word:gakokoyoj|gakokoyoj]] || [[word:gakokoyosh|gakokoyosh]] || [[word:gakokoyo|gakokoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gakoyoth|gakoyoth]] || [[word:gakoyoj|gakoyoj]] || [[word:gakoyosh|gakoyosh]] || [[word:gakoyo|gakoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gakofyoth|gakofyoth]] || [[word:gakofyoj|gakofyoj]] || [[word:gakofyosh|gakofyosh]] || [[word:gakofyof|gakofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gakoyotho|gakoyotho]] || [[word:gakoyojo|gakoyojo]] || [[word:gakoyosho|gakoyosho]] || [[word:gakoyoko|gakoyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gakoyoth|gakoyoth]] || [[word:gakoyoj|gakoyoj]] || [[word:gakoyosh|gakoyosh]] || [[word:gakoyo|gakoyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gakoyothol|gakoyothol]] || [[word:gakoyojol|gakoyojol]] || [[word:gakoyoshol|gakoyoshol]] || [[word:gakoyokol|gakoyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gakoyothotho|gakoyothotho]] || [[word:gakoyojojo|gakoyojojo]] || [[word:gakoyoshosho|gakoyoshosho]] || [[word:gakoyoko|gakoyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gakoyothon|gakoyothon]] || [[word:gakoyojon|gakoyojon]] || [[word:gakoyoshon|gakoyoshon]] || [[word:gakoyokon|gakoyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gakoyothoro|gakoyothoro]] || [[word:gakoyojoro|gakoyojoro]] || [[word:gakoyoshoro|gakoyoshoro]] || [[word:gakoyokoro|gakoyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
